title: Backend Engineer (Go)
description: Stripe-UK is building the UK's next-generation open banking platform. We use Go for its performance and simplicity in building financial APIs that need to be bulletproof. You'll join a small team of 6 engineers and own entire service slices from design to production.
responsibilities: Build high-performance payment APIs processing 100k TPS
Design gRPC service contracts and versioning strategies
Implement distributed tracing and observability instrumentation
Contribute to architectural decisions in a small, high-ownership team
